patch:
--- a/fifo_controller.v
+++ b/fifo_controller.v
@@ -1,17 +1,17 @@
 module fifo_write_unit (
   input clk,
   input rst,
-  input [7:0] data_in,
+  input [7:0] din,
   input wr_en,
   output full
 );
   // implementation
 endmodule
 
 module fifo_system (
   input clk,
   input rst,
   input [7:0] data_bus,
   input write_enable,
   output is_full
 );
   fifo_write_unit fifo_inst (
     .clk(clk),
     .rst(rst),
-    .data_in(data_bus),
+    .din(data_bus),
     .wr_en(write_enable),
     .full(is_full)
   );
 endmodule
before_code:
module fifo_write_unit (
  input clk,
  input rst,
  input [7:0] din,
  input wr_en,
  output full
);
  // implementation
endmodule

module fifo_system (
  input clk,
  input rst,
  input [7:0] data_bus,
  input write_enable,
  output is_full
);
  fifo_write_unit fifo_inst (
    .clk(clk),
    .rst(rst),
    .data_in(data_bus),
    .wr_en(write_enable),
    .full(is_full)
  );
endmodule
after_code:
module fifo_write_unit (
  input clk,
  input rst,
  input [7:0] din,
  input wr_en,
  output full
);
  // implementation
endmodule

module fifo_system (
  input clk,
  input rst,
  input [7:0] data_bus,
  input write_enable,
  output is_full
);
  fifo_write_unit fifo_inst (
    .clk(clk),
    .rst(rst),
    .din(data_bus),
    .wr_en(write_enable),
    .full(is_full)
  );
endmodule
